query:
INSERT INTO promo_codes (code, discountType, discountValue, tier, maxUses, currentUses, source, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('LAUNCH50', 'percentage', 50.00, 'monthly', 100, 0, 'launch', true, NOW(), NOW()),
('SPORTS20', 'percentage', 20.00, 'yearly', 50, 0, 'email', true, NOW(), NOW()),
('TWITTER50', 'percentage', 50.00, 'daily', 200, 0, 'twitter', true, NOW(), NOW()),
('REDDIT25', 'percentage', 25.00, 'monthly', 75, 0, 'reddit', true, NOW(), NOW()),
('BETTERSCORE', 'fixed', 10.00, 'monthly', 100, 0, 'affiliate', true, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE isActive = true, updatedAt = NOW();
